_doc: Per-run configuration. Everything org-specific lives here so the skill stays company/CRM agnostic. Copy to <workdir>/config.json and fill. Leave stage_map/stage_order until you see real stage labels in Phase 2, then rerun.
_org_domains_doc: Email domains of the SELLING org's reps. Used to split internal reps from external customers/partners and to build the roster keyed by email. Anyone whose email is on these domains is a candidate rep; everyone else is external.

scope._doc: Optional narrowing. null = whole corpus. Stated plainly in the report caveats.
scope._sample_doc: For a scoped pilot: list of deal_ids (or account names) to run before the full corpus. Set null for full run.

terminology._stall_label_doc: The operator's word for the parking stage: 'Hold' / 'Stalled' / 'Nurture' / 'Parked'.

currency._doc: Discovered from the data, not assumed. Set the symbol the deals and the calls actually use (dollars, rupees, euros, pounds). style 'short' formats large numbers as K/M/B; style 'indian' uses lakh/crore. The report reads this; nothing is hard-coded.

ingest._doc: Override paths if the layout differs. crm_columns/stage_columns/notes_columns map the export's real headers to canonical names (synonyms tried in order).
ingest._recording_doc: Where the transcript's recording URL is read from (transcript header field). 'no link' renders if absent.

stage_map._doc: Map each raw stage label to a canonical rung. Fill after Phase 2 prints the real labels. Canonical rungs: lead, qualify, demo, proposal, negotiation, won, lost, stalled.

stalled_definition._doc: Which deals count as stalled. derived_from='auto' lets link.py detect it; set 'config' to force.

scoring_universe._doc: Which calls feed rep×deal SCORES (the rest are context only).

roles._doc: Phase 3 infers each rep's archetype; the operator confirms here. overrides[] forces an archetype/seniority/exclusion. name_fixes consolidates display-name variants onto one canonical rep (keyed by email when possible).

rubric._doc: Overrides on schema/rubric.template.json. Leave {} to use defaults. You can override dimension weights per archetype, role bars, or per-rep seniority bars.

_min_calls_doc: Reps with fewer scored deals/calls than this are shown in a directional appendix, not the ranked leaderboard.
caveats: The corpus is calls only. Email, phone, and in-person interactions are not included; absence of a behavior in the corpus is flagged, not penalized.
Craft scores are kept separate from deal outcomes by design.
